title: Find My Device - User location on the map
scenario: Find My Device map shows user location with blue dot and circle on Android, works with headset connected or disconnected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android device
Ensure GPS location permission is granted to the app
Tap on App Menu (hamburger icon or menu icon)
Observe the map view that loads
Repeat steps 4-7 with a Poly Bluetooth headset connected
Repeat steps 4-7 with no headset connected
expected: When the user navigates to App Menu → Find My Device (with GPS location permission granted), the user's location is displayed on a map. On Android, a full blue dot is shown when zoomed out, and a blue circle with a full blue dot in the middle when zoomed in. This works correctly with headset connected or disconnected.
